productDisplayName: Nike Men Zoom Hyperenforcer White Sports Shoes
description: An aggressive Basketball shoe for the pros, which is styled to please any fashion maven. The nike Hypernforcer XD is a shoe where stability and breathability are equally balanced. These pumped up kicks add a style element to your casual wardrobe and an aura of dominance if you're on the court! UpperHyperfuse construction at the upper for lightweight durability and breathability with mid-top stylingnike Zoom at the forefoot for low-profile, super-responsive cushioningBasketball-specific rubber crash pad at the heel for cushioning and durability The Nike Zoom Hyperenforcer PE features Hyperfuse construction, a process that blends three different layers of material to create a nearly seamless one-piece upperSuper-strong, ultra-lightweight Flywire nylon bundles, this shoe keeps the foot locked into place while offering zones of breathability right where you need themCushioning at collar for comfort and to keep heel in placePerforations at tongue for enhanced breathabilityDiamond-shaped cut-outs at upper for enhanced ventilationMidsoleLightweight Phylon midsole houses a low-profile Nike Zoom air unit, located at the forefoot, the Nike Zoom helps absorb impact while providing responsive cushioning for a comfortable feel.OutsoleThe durable rubber outsole has a modified herringbone pattern that's designed to grip the courts during fast-paced movementFlex grooves at the forefoot help increase natural range of motion so the foot can quickly move in any directionShoe careWipe the leather surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
